summary:
### 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 國際清算銀行警告穩定幣可能導致全球金融系統分裂，並指出其在貨幣功能上的不足，特別是在新興市場中。
2. 比特幣價格持續下滑，今日跌破60,000美元，面臨連續季度虧損的風險，市場情緒極度悲觀。
3. 邁克爾·塞勒暗示將再次購買比特幣，儘管目前策略仍虧損約130億美元。
4. 幣安面臨資金流出，周淨流出超過4億美元，正值MiCA截止日期臨近。
5. 恐懼貪婪指數顯示市場情緒極度恐懼，為18，反映當前投資者的悲觀情緒。

### 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場整體呈現下跌趨勢，比特幣（BTC）價格為59,309美元，日內下跌1.22%。以太幣（ETH）表現亦不佳，報價1565.3美元，跌幅為0.42%。儘管Solana（SOL）小幅上升0.34%，但大部分主流幣仍呈現空頭走勢。市場的整體氛圍受到了恐懼情緒的影響，投資者信心不足，導致資金持續流出。

### 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據技術指標，比特幣目前的RSI為27.02，顯示其處於超賣區域，短期內可能出現反彈。然而，均線仍顯示空頭趨勢，需謹慎觀察反彈力度。以太幣的RSI為29.02，同樣進入超賣區，表明可能進一步下行。相對而言，Solana的RSI為43.56，顯示出相對的穩定性，並呈現多頭訊號，或許是市場中的一線希望。

### 😱 市場情緒
當前的恐懼貪婪指數為18，屬於極度恐懼範疇，反映出市場對未來走勢的高度懷疑。社群情緒普遍悲觀，許多投資者對於持有加密資產的信心降低，擔心價格將進一步下跌。這種極端情緒有時候預示著潛在的反彈機會，但在未來幾天內，市場仍需留意盤整的情況。

### ⚠️ 風險提醒
投資者需注意市場波動性加劇的風險，特別是在比特幣和以太幣等主流幣持續下跌的情況下。穩定幣的風險也不容忽視，國際清算銀行的警告提示了潛在的系統性風險。此外，資金流出的情況可能會進一步加深市場的不穩定性，投資者在進行操作時應謹慎行事，隨時調整策略以應對市場變化。

### 🎯 今日觀察重點
關注比特幣的價格走勢，特別是在觸及60,000美元後的反應；若能反彈，將成為市場情緒的一個轉折點。同時，觀察邁克爾·塞勒是否會如其所言再次增持比特幣，這對市場的影響值得注意。此外，留意幣安的資金流出情況，以及未來幾天內市場是否會出現情緒的修正，這將為投資者提供重要的操作參考。

news.title: BIS says stablecoins fall short as money, warns of emerging-market risks in annual report
news.summary: The Bank for International Settlements argued in its annual report that stablecoins still fall short of money on singleness, elasticity and integrity.
news.title_zh: 國際清算銀行表示穩定幣在貨幣功能上不足，警告新興市場風險
news.summary_zh: 國際清算銀行在年度報告中指出穩定幣無法有效作為貨幣，並警告新興市場可能面臨風險。

news.title: BIS warns stablecoins risk fragmenting global financial system
news.summary: The Basel-based institution said that private digital tokens fall short of the requirements for sound money and urged policymakers to accelerate work on tokenized forms of central bank and commercial bank money.

news.title: Michael Saylor signals another bitcoin buy as Strategy sits about $13 billion underwater
news.summary: A Monday filing would mark Strategy's fourth straight week of buying, after a 520 BTC purchase on June 22 that was its smallest recent tranche.

news.title: Will Bitcoin price recover in July?
news.summary: Bitcoin’s past July gains and heavy short bets point to a rally toward $75,000, but a break below key support keeps the risk of $55,000 in play.

news.title: EU watchdog EBA details big crypto fines as landmark laws bite
news.summary: The European Banking Authority laid out a proposed penalty framework on Friday that can strip non-compliant significant token issuers of up to 12.5% of their annual revenue.

news.title: Samson Mow says bitcoin bottom is in despite skepticism from analysts

news.summary: Early exchange flow data show no clear signs of a mass migration from Binance ahead of the EU MiCA transition deadline, despite rivals' efforts to attract users.

news.title: Grayscale's Pandl hopes Strategy sells $3B in Bitcoin to restore confidence

news.title: Base post-mortem reveals sequencer bug behind back-to-back outages
news.summary: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

news.title: Bitcoin unspent transaction outputs signal capitulation underway: analyst
news.summary: “These periods have always been profitable for long-term investors,” said CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost.

news.title: SecondFi maps recovery path after $2.4 million Cardano wallet exploit, aims to return funds within two weeks
news.summary: An exploit drained about $2.4 million in ADA from 374 addresses over three days through a flaw in SecondFi's wallet-generation software.
